name: GCP Cloud Run Deployment Provider
description: Deploys circuit nodes as Google Cloud Run services. Each node becomes a Cloud Run service with its own URL. Edges are realized via BATON_<TARGET>_URL environment variables injected into each service. Requires google-cloud-run>=0.10 package.

types.name: GCPProvider

fields.name: _service_urls
fields.description: Maps node names to their deployed Cloud Run service URLs

types.description: Deploy circuit nodes as Google Cloud Run services. Maintains internal state of service URLs.

functions.name: _now_iso
functions.description: Returns the current UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format
postconditions: Returns ISO 8601 formatted timestamp string in UTC timezone

functions.name: _service_id
functions.description: Generate a Cloud Run service ID from circuit name, node name, and optional namespace. Converts to lowercase and replaces underscores with hyphens.

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Name of the node within the circuit

inputs.name: namespace
inputs.description: Optional namespace prefix for the service ID

postconditions: Returns hyphen-separated service ID in lowercase
Underscores are replaced with hyphens
If namespace is truthy, format is '{namespace}-{circuit_name}-{node_name}'
If namespace is falsy, format is '{circuit_name}-{node_name}'

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: Initialize GCPProvider with empty service URL mapping
postconditions: self._service_urls is initialized as empty dict
side_effects: Initializes instance state _service_urls to empty dict

functions.name: deploy
functions.description: Deploy each node in the circuit as a Google Cloud Run service. Optionally builds Docker images, creates/updates services, sets IAM policies for public access, and injects neighbor service URLs as environment variables in two passes.

inputs.name: circuit
inputs.description: Circuit specification containing nodes to deploy

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Deployment target with config including project, region, image_template, build settings

error_data.message: GCP provider requires google-cloud-run. Install with: pip install baton[gcp]
GCP provider requires 'project' in deployment config

error_cases.name: service_deployment_failure
error_cases.condition: Exception during service creation/update that is not 'already exists'

error_data.handling: Logged as error, node marked as FAULTED, deployment continues

error_cases.name: neighbor_url_update_failure
error_cases.condition: Exception during second pass service update with neighbor URLs

postconditions: Returns CircuitState with adapter states for each node
self._service_urls contains mappings for successfully deployed nodes
CircuitState.collapse_level is set to FULL_LIVE
Each successful node has status ACTIVE in state.adapters
Failed nodes have status FAULTED in state.adapters
side_effects: Sets IAM policies to make services publicly accessible
Builds and pushes Docker images if target.config['build'] == 'true'
Updates self._service_urls with deployed service URLs
Logs info, warning, and error messages

structured_side_effects.description: Creates, updates services and sets IAM policies

functions.name: teardown
functions.description: Delete all Cloud Run services associated with the circuit nodes and clear internal service URL cache

inputs.name: circuit
inputs.description: Circuit specification containing nodes to teardown

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Deployment target with config including project and region

error_data.message: GCP provider requires 'project' in deployment config

error_data.handling: Logged as warning, teardown continues for remaining services

postconditions: All Cloud Run services for circuit nodes are deleted
self._service_urls is cleared
side_effects: Deletes Cloud Run services via GCP API

functions.name: status
functions.description: Check the status of Cloud Run services for all circuit nodes. Determines readiness based on RoutesReady and ConfigurationsReady conditions, and sets collapse level based on live node count.

inputs.name: circuit
inputs.description: Circuit specification containing nodes to check

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Deployment target with config including project and region

error_data.message: GCP provider requires 'project' in deployment config

error_data.handling: Node marked as IDLE, logged as debug, status check continues

postconditions: Returns CircuitState with current status for each node
Nodes with ready services have status ACTIVE
Nodes with services not ready have status LISTENING
Nodes without accessible services have status IDLE
collapse_level is FULL_MOCK if no nodes are live
collapse_level is FULL_LIVE if all nodes are live
collapse_level is PARTIAL if some nodes are live
self._service_urls is updated with current service URLs
side_effects: Queries Google Cloud Run API for service status
Logs debug messages for services that cannot be retrieved

structured_side_effects.description: Debug logs for status retrieval failures

invariants: Service IDs are always lowercase with underscores replaced by hyphens
Container port is always 8080 for Cloud Run services
Default region is 'us-central1' if not specified
Environment variable BATON_NODE_NAME is always set for each service
Neighbor URLs are injected as BATON_{NEIGHBOR}_URL environment variables in uppercase with hyphens replaced by underscores
Services are made publicly accessible with roles/run.invoker for allUsers
Cloud Run condition state value 4 indicates CONDITION_SUCCEEDED
